gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/96)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/96)
text: الحسين بن محمد، عن معلى بن محمد، عن الوشاء، عن عبد الله بن سنان، عن الوليد ابن صبيح، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: سمعته يقول: ثلاثة ترد عليهم دعوتهم أحدهم رجل يدعو على امرأته وهو لها ظالم فيقال له: ألم نجعل أمرها بيدك.

en.sarwar: 6. Al-Husayn from Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Washsha’ from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan from al-Walid ibn Sabih who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘The prayers of three kinds of people are returned to them without a favorable answer. One of such people is one who prays against his wife to whom he is unjust and it is said to him, ‘Have we not given you the authority to divorce her?”’
